name: vibegod
description: VibeGod Tech Team — a virtual enterprise engineering + product team that guides you through building a platform end-to-end with OWASP/WCAG/OODA baked in and best-effort security/QA guardrails at runtime.

plugins.name: vibegod-tech-team
plugins.description: A self-contained, virtual Google/Anthropic-grade tech team: lead orchestrator + role subagents + battle-tested methodology skills + best-effort security guardrails (heuristic, fail-open — a safety net, not a security boundary). Drives a strict, gated SDLC (PRD -> journey -> stack+cost -> modules -> foundation-first build -> multi-lens QA -> UAT/smoke -> ship).
